VAL-INSTALL-001.evidence: Clean-environment checks used an isolated npm global prefix. `which tsc` with PATH including only prefix/bin + system bins exited 1 (tsc absent). `npm ls -g typescript --depth=0 --prefix <isolated-prefix>` showed `(empty)` and exited 1. Install command `npm i -g github:jstxn/mors --prefix <isolated-prefix>` exited 127 with `npm error command sh -c npm run build` and `sh: tsc: command not found`. Follow-up `mors --version` exited 127 (`env: mors: No such file or directory`).
issues: GitHub shortcut npm install failed in a clean environment because install path invoked `npm run build` requiring `tsc`.
`mors` entrypoint was not created after install failure.

VAL-INSTALL-007-npm.evidence: npm distribution-path validation used `npm i -g github:jstxn/mors --prefix <isolated-prefix>` without manual `npm run build` and without global TypeScript. Command exited 127 with `tsc: command not found`, and subsequent `mors --version` exited 127 because binary was unavailable.
issues: npm GitHub shortcut path did not produce a working `mors` CLI entrypoint in clean conditions.
Install process depends on TypeScript availability not present in clean environment.

VAL-CROSS-007-npm.evidence: End-to-end npm first-run flow attempted from fresh isolated environment: install failed (`npm i -g github:jstxn/mors` equivalent with isolated prefix) exit 127 due to `tsc` missing. Because CLI was not installed, `mors --version`, `MORS_CONFIG_DIR=<unique-temp> mors init --json`, and `MORS_CONFIG_DIR=<unique-temp> mors inbox --json` each exited 127 (`mors: No such file or directory`).
issues: First-run operational flow could not proceed because npm install failed.
Required first-run commands were not runnable after install attempt.

frictions.description: `npm ls -g typescript --depth=0` returns exit code 1 even when output shows `(empty)`, which required interpreting output content rather than exit code alone for absence verification.
frictions.resolution: Used command output `(empty)` plus `which tsc` exit code 1 to confirm clean-environment TypeScript absence.
